name: Country Bran Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 40% Bran Flakes and boiling water in a bowl. Let stand for 10 minutes.
2. Sift together flour, baking soda, and salt; set aside.
3. Cream together shortening and sugar in a large mixing bowl until light and fluffy using an electric mixer at medium speed.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Stir in bran flakes mixture and all-bran into the creamed mixture.
6. Add dry ingredients alternately with butter/sour milk to the creamed mixture, mixing just enough to moisten.
7. Spoon batter into well-greased 1 1/2-inch muffin pan cups, filling 2/3 full.
8. Bake in a 400 degree F oven for 25 minutes or until golden brown.
9. Serve hot with butter and jam. NOTE: The batter can be stored for a few days in the refrigerator. Bake as directed.
